fields.title: Doing exercise is good for you!
fields.content: If you want to be healthier then exercise!

fields.title: Strengthen your core with yoga
fields.content: Although it seems unlikely, yoga can actually strengthen your core and make you stronger!

fields.title: Weight lifting is for everyone
fields.content: It's not just men who can do weight lifting but women too. It's not just young people who can do lifting but old people too.
